overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The player character ascends from a lower concrete area to an open plaza lined with palm trees and modern buildings with neon signage, ending near a group of NPCs by the water where bodies lie on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell and ramp ascending to upper promenade

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs from lower enclosed area
transitions from stairs to sloped concrete ramp walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and walking up a ramp to reach the upper promenade level, with concrete walls on both sides

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
sloped concrete walkway with metal handrails
tall concrete wall with horizontal panel texture
tall metal pole with fixtures at the top
building with colorful neon signage visible above the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a lower concrete area, ascending stairs and a ramp. The environment is enclosed by concrete walls with a utility pole visible, and colorful neon signs from distant buildings can be seen above the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with crenellated concrete wall

events.description: emerges onto upper promenade with distinctive crenellated concrete wall on right
turns slightly right following the curve of the promenade path

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade next to a crenellated wall, approaching NPCs standing on an upper level behind the wall

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing on upper level behind the crenellated wall, looking out toward the water

entered.detail: concrete wall with rectangular cutouts along the top edge
modern concrete seating blocks along the walkway
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated promenade with a distinctive crenellated concrete wall on the right. Concrete benches line the left side, and palm trees become visible in the distance. NPCs can be seen standing on an upper level behind the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and modern architecture

events.description: exits walled section into open waterfront area with unobstructed view of water and palm trees
strong sun glare increases as camera faces toward the bright morning sun reflecting off the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees, approaching modern glass buildings with the sun creating strong glare

entered.detail: open body of water with concrete retaining walls along the edge
large modern building with glass facade and 'Empathy' signage visible
tall modern street lamps with orange fixtures
rectangular concrete blocks arranged along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the path. The modern glass 'Empathy' building becomes prominent on the left while the water stretches out to the right. Strong morning sun creates glare as the camera moves forward along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with parked vehicles and waterfront seating

events.description: enters plaza area with parked cars and more pedestrian activity near the waterfront edge
discovers bodies and debris scattered on the ground near the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past parked cars and NPCs, approaching a group sitting by the waterfront where bodies lie on the ground

notable_agents.action: NPC with red hair sitting on the ground near the waterfront edge, looking out at the water
NPC standing and gesturing near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: several parked vehicles including a yellow taxi and blue car along the building
multiple bodies lying on the ground near the waterfront edge with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an urban plaza with parked cars along the modern building. NPCs are scattered about, some sitting near the water's edge. The camera approaches the waterfront railing where bodies and debris are visible on the ground, ending with a view of the water and distant palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined concrete underpass that gradually opens into a bright, expansive waterfront plaza. It begins by ascending stairs and a ramp within an enclosed concrete area, where colorful neon signs from distant buildings peek over the surrounding walls. As the camera reaches the top, the space expands into an elevated promenade lined with concrete benches and a crenellated wall, with palm trees appearing in the distance. The scene then opens further into a wide walkway beside the glass Empathy building, where the morning sun creates a strong glare across the concrete path and the open water. Finally, the camera moves through an urban plaza past parked cars and scattered NPCs before approaching the waterfront railing to reveal bodies and debris on the ground.
